form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 6 lengths (22.95) behind Aston Excess in a T3 RSTW on March 16. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 6 lengths (22.95) behind Aston Excess in a T3 RSTW on March 16. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (23.24) when second at Warragul in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (23.24) when second at Warragul in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Jumps from box 3 for the first time after placing latest at Warragul (23.30) in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 3 for the first time after placing latest at Warragul (23.30) in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and lost ground turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Fred's Fury at Warrnambool last start over 390m (22.58). Has good early speed and will stick on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Fred's Fury at Warrnambool last start over 390m (22.58). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.25) behind Spanish Fawn in a T3 Grade 7 on April 3. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (17.25) behind Spanish Fawn in a T3 Grade 7 on April 3. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on February 23 at Shepparton over 390m. Last start was second over 300m in 17.13, behind Spanish Fawn. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on February 23 at Shepparton over 390m. Last start was second over 300m in 17.13, behind Spanish Fawn. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (23.38) over 400m at Warragul. Has to overcome a wide draw but is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (23.38) over 400m at Warragul. Has to overcome a wide draw but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3 length fourth (17.15) over 300m at this track. Prepared to risk on this occasion.
